issues.description: f-string in MCP tool interpolates tool parameters — untrusted content may reach prompts or tool output.
issues.fix: Structure prompts explicitly; validate, allowlist, or escape user-controlled segments.

issues.description: Tool 'get_weather' contains 2 dangerous operations — scope may be too broad for safe MCP exposure.
issues.fix: Split into smaller single-purpose tools; narrow filesystem and process access.

issues.description: subprocess with shell=True and user-influenced input — command injection risk.
issues.fix: Use shell=False with argument lists; never pass user strings through a shell.
